title: cynoglossum hellwigii
intro: Cynoglossum hellwigii, also known as Hellwig's hound's tongue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cynoglossum hellwigii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve the use of its leaves and roots, often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
